review_text: Very nice caravan park with good amenities, well located.
Amazing caravan park, been going for the last few years now and will continue to do for a long time coming.
Very well equipped and clean washrooms. Very recommendable.

One of the loveliest caravan parks we've stayed in.
Many amenities. Beautiful lawns for camping. Adjacent to the lake's boardwalk. Plenty of birds.
Colourful and quirky. Well kept. Management is very friendly.
Thank you!

Friendly and helpful staff.
Beautiful shady sites.
Showers and toilets were immaculate.   Cleaning and maintenance of amenities best we have seen on our travels.
Quiet camping park with unpowered sites.lovely staff.small town but all you need .good value
Great park within walking distance to Eden, the beach and boardwalk walks. Everything you need. Great camp kitchen, clean amenities. Good size sites. Pool, tennis and golf for the kids.

Have stayed twice at this park in Eden. NSW
Really well maintained and sites are nice and level and well grassed where slab not provided. Amenities all clean. Main reason for stay is the fishing off surf beach 500 metres walk or drive. Australian salmon are prominent and Trevaly. Nice deep water in beach so no need to cast too far. Salted pilchards best bait.

Top spot. We had an unpowered site which is right down the back. Closest to the lake and pathway, green grass and beautiful outlook. Amenities were amazing - large and clean. Not the newest but certainly worthy of 5 star
Great park,hosts are great,heaps of room,big clean amenities,great camp kitchen.Lots of birdlife in & around the park & nice walks nearby + great value for money 👍
this is an awesome park , lots to do if you have kids, lots of shade , staff are so friendly  , very clean park , thank you from us Tassies
Stayed overnight on an unpowered site. This is one of the best parks we have stayed in, it is bright and fun with so much to do I wish we could stay longer.

I stayed at a site night across the aus day weekend with my partner while on a road trip

One of the best caravan parks I’ve been to in a long time, great facilities, great people both team at the park and the people they attract.

Very refreshing change from your other commercial park’s that are very cut and dry  -solely money orientated.

Price was extremely reasonable for the time of year as well!

Love the feeling of the park and would highly recommend to anyone else, if I ever pass back through I will more than definitely be staying here again!

Tom & Miah

Took a chance coming home via the coast. the staff were very nice and flexible with the booking as we were transient and only passing through. Facilities are amazing. I love the Sapphire coast. I will look to come back and stay here again. Close to the beach. the kids loved the pool and the play equipment. I stayed in my own van but the cabins appeared neat and well.laid out. multiple camp kitchen and toilet facilities. very clean and well maintained. Whole park is lovely and lush, they even had strawberry bushes in the gardens around the sights which I find novel and great use of the space. they had a boat wash which I through was practical for the area.
Awesome!

What a great park! Beautiful grounds, lots of shady trees, extremely clean amenities, huge shower bays and a well equipped camp kitchen. A great place to relax. Will definitely be back for a few days.
Great park, very friendly and quiet.
The nicest caravan park for Cletus caravan park on Sadie. Staff are amazing, especially the lady enough to help you beautiful part. Everything is absolutely spotless.
What a treasure this place is.  Garden of Eden for sure. Lots of wildlife, very clean amenities, plenty of space, pet friendly, a great boardwalk in a small town called Eden

The first time we stayed  here and it was great, fantastic facilities,well maintained and heaps of open space. Short stroll to board walk around the lake and not far from the beach.|The hosts were friendly and helpful.|Will definely stay here again when visiting Eden

Sehr netter CP mit super ausgestatteter, gemütlicher Küche, in der wir gefrühstückt und zu Abend gekocht und gegessen haben. Saubere und großzügige Sanitäranlagen, professionelle Waschmaschinen und Trockner, jeweils 5 A$.
Huge campsites, great amenities and easy walking distance to the whale festival festivities.
Friendly staff, very clean amenities and very well kept park. Great place for a few nights
Lovely caravan park, quiet, super clean amenities,  lovely shady site and not sure who greeted us at arrival but best welcome in 4 months of travelling 🙏

Huge , shaded sites at the far end, backing onto the neighbouring high schools at farm and view of the lake with access to the boardwalk. Beautifully maintained and spotlessly clean amenities. Kids loved the tennis, ping pong and mini golf.
Great place to stay with lots of activities and things to do nearby as well.

Just a great caravan park all round, that was clear the owners take pride in and care of; and have very freidnly and helpful staff. We have been all over Aus and seen parks of all shapes and sizes and this one just seemed to tick everybox catering for every type of traveller. It definitely had some of the best kept amenities we have come across, they were spotless. Great grassy sites and all the facilities like camp kitchens etc had everything you could ask for!!!

We stayed here with our caravan. Powered sight. Bea was delightful at the reception. The grounds are lovely. The bathrooms and toilets are immaculate !!  Lovely staff everywhere.Location is just the best ! Highly recommend you stay here. The prices are also so reasonable also 1st caravan park we could also use our T.V cable. Thankyou 🥰

Beautiful park with amazing facilities in a great location within walking distance to the beach, shops and historic attractions. Bea was friendly and helpful providing handy information on check in.
Had an ensuite site which was great being in a small Toyota van with my fur baby - the bathroom was spotless. As for the camp kitchen, it's incredible! Multiple fridges and freezers, kettles, microwave, oven, two sinks, dishes and utensils to use plus a wood fire, dining tables inside and on the deck, TV, books, couch... if you were roughing it in a tent this space is a campers haven. The pretty gardens are well maintained and you're greeted by Bo the Macaw every time you pass him.
This would be the best caravan park I've ever visited and will definitely stay here again!
This is one of the best cabins i have stayed in. The grounds and cabin were lovely, clean, well set out and maintained. The staff were excellent. Highly recommended a stay here. Thank you

The friendly welcome at check-in and prior on the phone was delightful. We are one of a few in the park, it has been relaxing. The Amenities are nicely set up, the showers have good pressure, hot water, a bench wide enough for my bag and plenty of hooks. The only thing we miss is warm water taps at the basins, the push button cold water system is not for us. The decorations in the Amenities block make it so inviting. The kitchen is well equipped has everything you need, the area for sitting inside and outside is perfect, and the couch to read or watch TV was lovely. Good laundry facility.  The pool looks so inviting.  We used the back gate to follow the pathway to the board walk that runs along the lake. We felt comfortable, everything was clean and looked after.
Great place to stay. I had an ensuite site which was great 👍
Love it here!! We've been back three times now and hope to keep coming back. Really kid friendly.

Best campsite me and my partner have visited so far whilst traveling around Australia, so well kept and tidy. Amazing amenities aswell, mini golf, tennis, trampolines, basket ball court, playgrounds, pools, amazing fire pit area with wood provided, tv room, cozy indoor kitchen, even a pet and boat wash. Plus super close to the beach and a beautiful location surrounded by so much wildlife! Highly recommend we couldn’t believe how affordable it was compared to other campsites we’ve stayed at along the way that weren’t even a quarter as good! Thankyou for our stay - very pet and kid friendly 😊

Amenities are fabulous, the park is beautiful and location to town is quite good.
My only issue is where we were during our stay which was mosquito saturated.

Stayed over Easter awesome place to visit, kept very clean, great place for kids and is also pet friendly. Great staff , barbecue area, pool and bins always well maintained thanks Ed great job mate. Thanks Gary ground's always look awesome.  Thanks also to the girls who keep the amenities nice and clean. Last thanks to Bea the manager who does a great job, this place has an awesome team. Will definitely visit again and hope to get the same spot across from the communal firepit.🥰

My wife and I are currently staying here over Easter. If we could rate this park a "6" instead of a 5 we definitely would. Even though the caravan park is full it still has a lovely peaceful and relaxing vibe. The location of this park being right on the lake is great, ideal for a walk or bike ride, as are the super well maintained amenities and incredible add on touches such as the gardens, the little figurines that make it a "Garden of Eden", the mini golf and pool.
However what absolutely makes this park stand out are the amazing manager Bea and her colleague Michelle. They are both incredible people with their friendly hospitality, positive demeanour, willingness to help, and even put up with my grumpiness !!.  We have quite a large motorhome that was not really suitable for the site we booked, and despite it being busy, they both were really fantastic in managing to accommodate our needs. As many other reviews have said, in all our travels, Bea and Michelle  are right up there as being absolutely awesome and beautiful people who really try to look after their customers with a lovely smile!.  No wonder so many people we have met here are return visitors - we will be back for sure!
Thank you so much!!   Ellie and Greg

Sadly not very satisfying for me.
Ok, arrived with my mototohome quite late, nevertheless shortly after 6pm.
Gate close, but was able to give the operator a call.
No willingness to give me access to the site, since there "IS NOT SPACE AVAILABLE".
My personal view - less than 50% occupied.

What a great park. |Grassy sites, dog friendly with a heated dog bath, wifi that works, clean spacious amenities, amazing camp kitchen with a lounge and fireplace.  Gardens are beautiful. There are swings and trampolines. |Next to the board walk to go around the lake or to the beach.
What a great park. Lots of grassy sites. Pet friendly with a hot dog bath! Wifi actually works. Amenities are large and spacious. Camp kitchen is great. The bell birds sound amazing as well

Great location, wonderful leafy environment close to town. The facilities are so clean and there are facilities to cater for everything even a dog wash and boat wash. Pool is small but lovely. I would highly recommend this park, thank you for a lovely stay.

This is one of the nicest caravan parks I have stayed in. Quiet treed setting. Bellbirds singing in the trees all day. Backs on to a lake. Good size caravan sites. Amenities are big and clean. The pool area is beautiful surrounded by garden, toddlets pool also with fountains and picnic tables next to the pools so you can habe lunch while watching the kids. No end of playground equipment. Not far from the shops. Friendly staff. I can't fault this place. Definately a place I will return to.
This was a great park to stay with our motor home. Friendly people, good spots, clean and modern amenities and a lot of creative spots around the campsite. Enjoyed the boardwalk next to the park.
Great for families. Very nice Park with lots of trees and cozy places
Dog friendly. Highlight was the boardwalk in the back corner.

Nice caravan park with super clean amenities and camp kitchen with absolutely everything you could need. Definitely recommend walking to the Asling Beach Rock Pool for a swim or doing the full loop walk around the river and to the beach (note it’s sometimes cut off by the tide).
Caravan park not hotel
We stayed in a caravan.  This was our third year and we love it. Beautiful green grass to camp on.  Clean facilities and a short walk to the beach.  I absolutely love it

The caravan park is in a perfect location with a walks around the lake/ to the beach. Amenities were clean and well kept after, our unpowered campsite was large with lush green grass. The park is very family friendly!!

We really enjoyed our stay at this park. Reception staff were the most lovely we have ever had, and even though the park was full of holiday goers, staff made themselves known and always stopped to have a friendly chat when maintaining the grounds. We felt very safe here. We had a great shady site right by the playground and trampolines, which were well looked after. The park had lots for kids; swimming pool with waterslide, tennis court, free mini golf, birds, giant chess and photo props. The jumping pillow was not inflated when we stayed, however I imagine it would be popular too. Loved this park, and would not hesitate to book there again when in Eden.

We had the best time on our campervan site for 2 nights - the people who run the park are lovely, the amenities were incredibly clean and we had a grass site with lots of space so it was perfect. We’ve travelled up and down the coast and this is one of the best parks by far!
Awesome camping fun for the kids. Very clean and well managed.

Ein schöner campground, viel Grün, große sites powered und unpowered, tadellose amenities in reichliche Anzahl, getrennt sind Duschen und WCs, freundliche reception!!! Das alles für wirklich günstige Kosten! TV Raum, Pool, kitchen, laundry... Alles da! So soll ein guter, sehr guter Campingplatz aussehen!!!
Accueil très sympa, beau camping avec tous les équipements au top (camp kitchen, toilettes, douches avec ambiance musicale!), terrain de tennis, ping pong…tout ça à 5min du centre ville.

Sensational caravan park.
Awesome amenities   plenty to do
Great price..absolutely love the place
Highly recommended
This park is beautiful and underpriced in my opinion. Michelle is absolutely lovely and made my girls feel incredibly welcome. A gorgeous place with plenty of soul
Such a beautifully kept caravan park with amenities and fun for everyone ✨️

You can feel the love and care in this park.
So clean and well maintained.
Highly recommend

Cabin was very comfortable, if a tad old. Location is brilliant, walking distance to the beach, 600m to the shops and across the street to a takeaway/cafe. The service was top notch, from the moment I arrived until I left (3 weeks later)

We had a lovely stay here despite the fact we both had come down with a wretched virus. Bee is so bubbly and bright made us most welcome. The park is kept immaculately clean especially the facilities. Only complaint is there wasn't any bins in the barbecue and end area of the park. Apart from that we hope to return again one day, without the virus plaguing us.
Amazing place to stop, the best camp kitchen we have seen, great facilities. We were extremely happy with Garden of Eden and highly recommended you stop in.

Wow! We found this park off a facebook recommendation and didn't know how it would actually be. What an amazing park!
It was huge, with more facilities and activities than any other park we've stayed at. Very green, with lots of trees and backing onto bushland and a lake. The staff I spoke to were lovely, welcoming and very helpful.
The only disappointing thing is that we couldn't stay longer.
Thanks for a lovely stay!
This could be the best $36 I have ever spent! Great amenities… amazing camp kitchen and the best grass make sure you stop here!!
Excellent park, great pitch, excellent facilities,and very clean.

Very special caravan park! Spacious kitchen with lots of tables, games and books, very kids friendly! Beautiful veranda, huge green sites, very clean and nice pool area!
Had the place almost to our own and really enjoyed our stay!
Beautiful caravan park. Very friendly.
Caravan,very shady and quiet
Great facilities, great service,  grassy level sites. Loved it.
Sehr gepflegter, sauberer und liebevoll hergerichteter Campingplatz. Ein Ort an dem man gerne bleibt.
Just wonderful, the service on arrival just Wunderbar

One of the loveliest parks we've ever stayed in. Hosts very welcoming, amenities super clean, shady spacious sites and the boardwalk to Aslings beach is right next to it with a gate. Dog friendly, as is Aslings beach.

This is a wonderful caravan park. It’s located a stones throw from everything in Eden. Facilities are excellent, and they are kept in excellent condition. You can tell the folks who run it have pride in the place. Highly recommended!
great except the inconsiderate campers ne t door with a toxic fire(must have been treated pine) that stained all out towels and clothes and made us sneeze  and noise till 12 midnight.

Absolutely recommend this caravan park. The entrance to the office is the cutest garden path, and inside there is a parrot who talks, and the receptionist is very friendly. Where we parked our van was next to a high school, which have chickens and sheep, and it was a delight to hear them. The park has so many amenities for children, and a board walk that goes around the whole lake. The whole caravan park has beautiful gardens. I would definately stay again
Fantastic park

Loved our stay here! The cabin we stayed in was a last minute choice & they were so accomodating and the cabin was very well kept and clean. I haven’t seen a park with so much to do for a while! Lots of things for littles to do & close to town. Highly recommend!
Unpowered site for 2... $70 .  I think is too expensive.

Very lovely family campsite with lots of amenities including a TV room & Toddler room. Shower cubicles are clean and very big, even have the radio playing whilst you wash. We started the day with the boardwalk around the lake. No complaints!
Can’t want for anything more!!!!

This is probably the closest you'll get to campers heaven if you believe in that stuff,it's set in the most incredible tree setting to rival anything you'll find anywhere including Bright Victoria, the amenities are so spotless you could perform open-heart surgery with no risk of infection, I recommend to everyone when travelling, welcoming friendly staff ,absolute pleasure to stay here
Amazing caravan park. Free mini golf and the best camp kitchen!

This is a beautiful park in Eden. Gardens and grounds really well maintained and park has everything you could want. Amenities are spotless and best equipped camp kitchen we’ve seen. Service was great. … we had an issue with the tv and staff couldn’t do enough to help… will definitely be back.

Powered Site, 2 people, $45. Such a great little place. Staff are very friendly and helpful, you really feel welcome. The grounds are well kept with beautiful flowers and plenty of pathways. Amenities are clean and plentiful. Kitchen set up with cooktop, ovens, microwave, slow cooker s and two $1 BBQ. Laundry is $5/load. Long term residents are friendly as well.
Friendly staff in n all levels, clean amenities,  quiet peaceful serene.
Great to camping, facilities perfect, powered and water available, nice place
Stayed 4 nights because our car broke down. Delightfulcaravan Park. Location to board walk is brilliant. Permanent residents are friendly and helpful.
Lovely park with very clean amenities. Friendly staff and lots to do.

From the minute you arrive at this caravan park, you notice how interesting it is. Then you wind your way to Reception and are met by a beautiful blue and yellow macaw (bird). The receptionist is friendly but professional and from then on everything continues to be great. It's the only caravan park since we left Adelaide to separate papers and bottles for recycling. The amenities are clean, and so are the barbecues. We loved our stay here.
Lovely quiet park. Ensuite site with the best showers. We will definitely return.

What an awesome park. We rocked up unannounced & the reception by Beau the Macaw was a surprise. The service supplied by Bea was a pleasure. Nothing was to much for her to assist. The amenaties were excellent, & the site was great.

Loved the walks (on a flat Boardwalk) to the Beach and around the lake.
Short distance to so many vantage points to take in the Beautiful views over the water.
We will be back and so will our relatives 10 out of 10 👍😊
Great location

A lovely campsite! Toilets very clean, great activities for kids and adults, the pool looked very clean and lovely staff!
The beautiful bird in the office is awesome!!!

Lovely caravan park with lush green surrounds in a quiet location with clean amenities. The boardwalk along the lagoon is beautiful and it's a fairly easy walk into town. Unfortunately the camp kitchen was being painted/updated during our stay, but the staff loaned us an electric kettle which was very kind :)

Managers were lovely friendly, very welcoming.
Park beautiful and clean,  we travel with 2 medium sizes dogs lots great walking areas to take them to, as well dog wash facilities.Would recommend this park as the place to stay in Eden.
